# Reusable Templates

These templates are the practical build layer of the repository.

They are for users who want to start with a tested pattern instead of reading the whole theorem spine first.

## Available Templates

- [Restricted linear recovery template](restricted-linear-recovery-template.md)
- [Functional observability template](functional-observability-template.md)
- [Periodic projection template](periodic-projection-template.md)
- [Ambiguity witness template](ambiguity-witness-template.md)
- [No-go detection template](no-go-detection-template.md)
- [Minimal-information sweep template](minimal-information-sweep-template.md)
- [Asymptotic observer template](asymptotic-observer-template.md)
- [Exact projector template](exact-projector-template.md)

## Template Rule

Each template states:
- assumptions
- inputs
- outputs
- validation checks
- interpretation guide
- limitations

Each template also points to a real script in `scripts/templates/`.
